response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided lyrics reference for 'Oki ni Mesu mama'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for both original Japanese lyrics and English translations, with manual timing alignment performed to sync with vocal bursts. 3. Timing & Pacing: The song is fast-paced; aggressive end-time truncation and instantaneous transitions were applied to ensure subtitles keep pace with the vocals and prevent cascading delays. Visual event subtitles were included for the introductory screen and song title card.

subtitles.original: TAN The Autofister Network 3D LIVE
subtitles.english: [Title: TAN The Autofister Network 3D LIVE]

subtitles.original: お気に召すまま / Lyrics & Music: Eve
subtitles.english: [Song: As You Like It / Lyrics & Music: Eve]

subtitles.original: 淡々 言葉を吐いた
subtitles.english: I spit out indifferent words

subtitles.original: あんな思い出に泣いたのは
subtitles.english: I cried over those memories

subtitles.original: 今日で終わりにしないか
subtitles.english: Can't we put an end to this today?

subtitles.original: 1, 2 の合図を待って
subtitles.english: Waiting for the 1, 2 signal

subtitles.original: ユーエンミー手を取りあったのは
subtitles.english: Holding hands, just you and me

subtitles.original: 僕の勇気ある行動 フェイズ＜1＞
subtitles.english: An act of courage for me, Phase 1

subtitles.original: 立ち止まんないでいいんだからね
subtitles.english: ‘Cause we shouldn't stand still, right?

subtitles.original: 空々しいな この人生
subtitles.english: Life is a sham

subtitles.original: できないだなんて 言わないでね
subtitles.english: Don’t say you can't do it

subtitles.original: 言わないでね
subtitles.english: Don't say it

subtitles.original: 今更なんて 言わないでね
subtitles.english: Don’t say it's too late now

subtitles.original: 僕ら今 さあさあ輪になって 回り始める
subtitles.english: Come on, come on, now we form a circle and start to spin

subtitles.original: 段々嫌になって でも好きになる
subtitles.english: Bit by bit I come to hate it, but I come to like it

subtitles.original: ねえねえ わかんないや 自分会議も
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, I don't even understand the meeting of my selves

subtitles.original: どんどん 中に寄って でも離れてく
subtitles.english: We steadily close the gap, but we remain far apart

subtitles.original: ぱっぱっ 音に乗って 踊り始める
subtitles.english: Da-dum, carried by the music we start to dance

subtitles.original: 散々嫌になって でも好きになる
subtitles.english: Wretchedly, I come to hate it, but I come to like it

subtitles.original: ねえねえ わかんないや この先もずっと
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, I don't understand now or ever

subtitles.original: 僕の心をシェイクシェイク いえい
subtitles.english: Shake shake my heart, yay

subtitles.original: 大正解なんてないのさ
subtitles.english: There’s no such thing as a right answer

subtitles.original: じゃあ一体どこに向かえば
subtitles.english: So, where the hell do I have to go

subtitles.original: 物語は終わりますか
subtitles.english: To find the end of this story?

subtitles.original: 1, 2 の合図を待って
subtitles.english: Waiting for the 1, 2 signal

subtitles.original: ユーエンミー手が触れ合ったのは
subtitles.english: Holding hands, just you and me

subtitles.original: 僕の勇気ある行動 フェイズ＜2＞
subtitles.english: An act of courage for me, Phase 2

subtitles.original: 畏まったって 意味ないんだって
subtitles.english: There’s no meaning to being humble and respectful

subtitles.original: 恥ずかしがった 夢にばいばいです
subtitles.english: So bye-bye to my embarrassing dreams

subtitles.original: この先ずっとよろしくね、よろしくね。
subtitles.english: From now on, forever, let’s get along, let's get along.

subtitles.original: 君と今さあさあ交わって 目を逸らしあう
subtitles.english: Come on, come on, we now avert our eyes from each other

subtitles.english: I steadily become better, but I'm crumbling to pieces
